story.title: Kaiser nurses say AI, workplace surveillance are making their jobs, care worse

draft:
I'm concerned about the impact of AI on healthcare workers after reading about Kaiser nurses speaking out against its effects. 
Kaiser nurses report that AI and surveillance are increasing their workload and stress. 
This raises questions about the balance between tech and patient care. 
What are the long-term consequences of prioritizing efficiency over nurse well-being?
#AIinHealthcare #NursingProfession #HealthcareTechnology
